name: Cauliflower Italiano
recipeInstructions:
1. In an 8-inch SKILLET, cook ONION and GARLIC in SALAD DRESSING until TENDER.
2. Add CAULIFLOREATS and 1/4 CUP WATER. COVER and COOK OVER LOW HEAT for 10 MINUTES.
3. Add GREEN PEPPER. CONTINUE COOKING until CAULIFLOWER is TENDER, about 5 MORE MINUTES.
4. STIR in the remaining INGREDIENTS and HEAT THROUGH.
5. SERVES 6
